title: Collect and preserve biological samples
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect and preserve biological samples demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for collection

pcs.text: Confirm the purpose and schedule for sampling with manager
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the purpose and schedule for sampling with manager?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the purpose and schedule for sampling with manager.

pcs.text: Identify sampling site location and obtain approval for site access from stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sampling site location and obtain approval for site access from stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sampling site location and obtain approval for site access from stakeholders.

pcs.text: Identify samples to be collected and preserved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify samples to be collected and preserved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify samples to be collected and preserved.

pcs.text: Identify and comply with legislative and regulatory requirements governing biological samples and sampling methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with legislative and regulatory requirements governing biological samples and sampling methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with legislative and regulatory requirements governing biological samples and sampling methods.

pcs.text: Organise equipment required for biological sampling and preserving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise equipment required for biological sampling and preserving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise equipment required for biological sampling and preserving.

pcs.text: Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and sensitive environments for impact on sampling and testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and sensitive environments for impact on sampling and testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and sensitive environments for impact on sampling and testing.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan for collection

elements.title: Prepare equipment and resources

pcs.text: Obtain equipment required for sampling and preserving
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain equipment required for sampling and preserving?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain equipment required for sampling and preserving.

pcs.text: Check equipment for availability and serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check equipment for availability and serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check equipment for availability and serviceability.

pcs.text: Clean and sanitise equipment to maintain integrity of samples and biosecurity conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and sanitise equipment to maintain integrity of samples and biosecurity conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sanitise equipment to maintain integrity of samples and biosecurity conditions.

pcs.text: Collect record sheets necessary for task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect record sheets necessary for task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect record sheets necessary for task.

pcs.text: Transport resources and personnel safely to sampling sites and prepare for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport resources and personnel safely to sampling sites and prepare for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport resources and personnel safely to sampling sites and prepare for use.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare equipment and resources

elements.title: Carry out biological sampling and preserving procedures

pcs.text: Collect samples according to sampling plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect samples according to sampling plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect samples according to sampling plan.

pcs.text: Apply environmental sustainability and biosecurity practices to collection processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply environmental sustainability and biosecurity practices to collection processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply environmental sustainability and biosecurity practices to collection processes.

pcs.text: Preserve and record samples in accordance with sampling standards and guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preserve and record samples in accordance with sampling standards and guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preserve and record samples in accordance with sampling standards and guidelines.

pcs.text: Prepare, package and dispatch samples for external analysis in accordance with sampling schedule and laboratory standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare, package and dispatch samples for external analysis in accordance with sampling schedule and laboratory standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare, package and dispatch samples for external analysis in accordance with sampling schedule and laboratory standards.

pcs.text: Observe and record ambient and antecedent environmental conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and record ambient and antecedent environmental conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and record ambient and antecedent environmental conditions.

pcs.text: Operate equipment and undertake work according to workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate equipment and undertake work according to workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate equipment and undertake work according to workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Report and deliver presentable sample collection according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and deliver presentable sample collection according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and deliver presentable sample collection according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record site sampling results and observations according to workplace recording procedures.

pcs.text: Report changes in field conditions and equipment to manager
